textPlain: I my eyes, PdfSharpCore¹ is now the "canonical" version of pdfcore.IMHO the list is incomplete without it.1: https://github.com/ststeiger/PdfSharpCore

It seems the PDFSharp rabbit hole goes even deeper than I've realized!Latest MigraDoc & PDFSharp seem to have been updated and ported to .NET 6 after a lot of the forks happened, so it was unclear to me whether there's merits in looking at other, mostly abandoned forks.I might add PdfSharpCore, though the use of SixLabors.ImageSharp and SixLabors.Fonts leads to a disqualification from the "quest", given their custom split license [1]Edit: Actually, the license seems to turn into an Apache 2.0 license, when used with an open source licensed project and also as transitive dependency. Certainly a confusing license.[1] https://github.com/SixLabors/ImageSharp/blob/main/LICENSE
